summary: The diff implements comprehensive Portuguese (Brazil) localization and timeframe restrictions (M1/M5/M10 only). All user-facing text is translated, timeframe options are limited to M1/M5/M10 with M1 as default, and directional arrows (↑/↓) are added to buy/sell signals. Processing stages, results screen, history, settings, and all UI components display Portuguese text. Backend migration handles timeframe type conversion. Some implementation details may be incomplete due to file truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend AnalysisResult includes only M1, M5, or M10 as suggested timeframes
missing_requirements.reason: The backend AnalysisResult type does not include a suggested timeframe field based on the visible backend/main.mo code. The type definition shows direction, resistanceLevels, candlestickPatterns, pullbacks, breakouts, trendStrength, confidencePercentage, timestamp, and image fields, but no timeframe field for suggested timeframes.

missing_requirements.requirement: File type and size limit messages are in Portuguese
missing_requirements.reason: File truncation prevents verification of all file type and size limit error messages in FileUpload.tsx. Only some messages are visible ('Por favor, envie um arquivo PNG, JPG, JPEG ou PDF', 'O tamanho do arquivo deve ser menor que 10MB'), but complete verification is impossible.
